LAW AND MOTION, 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE KNOWS ELAINE RUSHING, WHO WAS THE ARBITRATOR IN THIS CASE. THEY ARE BOTH MEMBERS OF INN OF COURT. THE JUDGE SEES HER OCCASIONALLY AT INN OF COURT EVENTS AND ARE NOT SOCIAL FRIENDS OUTSIDE THE INN. THIS FACT DOES NOT AFFECT THE COURT'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. THE COURT GAVE COUNSELS THE OPPORTUNITY TO ASK QUESTIONS. NO QUESTIONS WERE ASKED OR OBJECTIONS WERE RAISED. PETITIONERS KATHLEEN WALSH AND PATRICIA WALSH DUGGAN'S MOTION TO VACATE AND/OR CORRECT CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION UPON THE LAST RECEIPT OF THE FORM OF ORDER FROM COUNSELS. EACH SIDE TO SUBMIT FORMS OF ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. SUBMITTED ON MAR-01-2013 BY MARLA J. MILLER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. Notice Of Motion Amd Otion To Vacate And/Or Correct Contractual Arb Award
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARTIN GLICKFELD, TEL. NO. 441-7491 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
ATTY. STEVEN LANDE OF LANDER & SHAW, TEL. NO. 524-5913 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; Judge Miller disclosed that she knows Elaine Rushing, who was the arbitrator in this case. They are both members of Inn of Court. The judge sees her occasionally at Inn of court events and are not social friends outside the Inn. This fact does not affect the Court's ability to be fair and impartial in this case. The Court gave counsels the opportunity to ask questions. No questions were asked or objections were raised. PETITIONERS KATHLEEN WALSH AND PATRICIA WALSH DUGGAN'S Motion To Vacate And/Or Correct Contractual Arbitration Award is taken under submission upon the last receipt of the form of order from counsels. Each side to submit forms of order for the court's consideration. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
